paperInfo.authors: Moo Jin Kim et al.
paperInfo.abstract: We introduce OpenVLA, a 7B-parameter open-source vision-language-action model (VLA) pretrained on diverse robot manipulation datasets. OpenVLA achieves state-of-the-art results among open-weights models and supports drop-in fine-tuning for new robotic tasks.

specs.paradigm: VLA

paperInfo.authors: Google DeepMind Robotics Team
paperInfo.abstract: We present RT-X, a model trained on a large-scale, cross-embodiment dataset to enable generalization across different robots. By combining data from 22 embodiments, we observe emergent cross-robot transfer capabilities.
